race.comment: BOOM BREAK (1) is a consistent conveyance who is yet to miss the top-five in seven starts to date and this is not an overly strong affair. Will be rock-hard fit for this and gets some weight relief with the 2kg claim. Ticks a few boxes for a race like this. STEFFI ELECTRICA (10) may have suffered from the dreaded second-up syndrome last time out but the form prior was full of merit. Worth another chance. BLAKEMORE AVENUE (9) is a bit hit or miss but is more than capable enough on her day. Can feature if she brings her A-game. ENHANCE (2) was a touch flat last start but has a win and a second from two attempts over this track and trip and can bounce back without surprising. SUPERSONIC MAN (3) next in line from the inside alley.
